events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the marking colors were misread against the APWA uniform color code (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm), this is treated as a **fail** at **high risk** — misidentifying a mark color can lead to digging near an unidentified energized or gas line. Actions center on stopping work, re-verifying through 811/the locator, and reflagging before resuming rough-in.
